data.body:
SESSION WRAP-UP — plan-review threshold calibration + verify-budget bug + PR 86 reconciliation.

== 1. Threshold calibration (story 3d3d → PR 87, MERGED) ==
Goal: turn the advisory-by-default plan-review gate (all 32 LLM criteria at block_threshold=0.95,
posture=advisory) into calibrated per-criterion blocking defaults, from the dogfooded REVIEW_RESULT
sidecar corpus (171 sidecars / 109 tickets / 1412 findings).
Data shape: REVIEW_RESULT slim findings carry id (stable content hash), criteria[], tier (DET/LLM),
decision (block/advisory/dropped/indeterminate), validity/impact/priority (priority=validity×impact),
the 7 verifier binary sub-answers + cited_reference veto, + per-event material_fingerprint /
coverage.routing / metrics. Source-of-truth for thresholds = criteria_routing.json {block_threshold,
default_posture}; orchestrator._threshold_for maps posture→blocking_enabled, bt=min over a finding's criteria.
Signals: (A) verifier-refutation — use DENSE validity, not the sparse 'dropped' (only ~18). (B) voluntary
revision-response — material_fingerprint change between consecutive reviews = a revision; CONFOUND: exact
finding-id survival reads ~100% for LLM criteria (finder rewords each run) vs 13% for the one DET criterion,
so attribute at criterion-load-delta granularity.
Decision (Step-5 interactive): flip G6, COH, T5e, E2, G5, F1, T4 → blocking@0.70; keep FP-prone
(G1G2/T6/T5b/E5/E6/F4) and confident-but-ignored (T3/T10/T8) advisory; no policy blockers.
Sidecar enrichment (approved, UX-invisible): norm_id (reword-tolerant) + location added to sidecar
findings; test pins the surfaced library/MCP/CLI verdict is byte-unchanged.
Validation (Step 7): re-reviewed 20 high-finding/overlay tickets → 7 BLOCK / 10 PASS / 3 INDETERMINATE;
every block validity≥0.857 & impact≥0.75; 0.70 on a stable plateau (=0.75=0.80). Script+writeup in
docs/experiments/.

== 2. Verify-budget bug (bug 59bc → PR 87, MERGED) ==
The 3 INDETERMINATE in Step 7 traced to a real bug: the agentic Pass-2 verifier exhausted its 50-step
budget on finding-rich tickets; the failure was misclassified as llm_unavailable, DISCARDING the Pass-1
findings → hollow INDETERMINATE that fail-closed BLOCKS the claim. Two root causes: (1) the runner read
self._config.max_iterations, IGNORING per-request req.config (so a per-step override never reached it);
(2) the agentic verifier budget didn't scale with finding count.
Fix: runner.effective_max_iterations(floor, requested)=max(floor,requested) — a request may RAISE the
floor for one call; RunnerAgentStep scales via with:step_budget_per_item=25/finding (carried in with: since
the v3 step schema is closed); verify-step failure RECOVERED (gate_dispatch._recover_plan_review_verify_failure)
— Pass-1 findings preserved via pass3 w/ empty verifications → INDETERMINATE (no new state) + coverage.verify_failed
(≠ llm_unavailable); finalize_verdict fails OPEN unless a finding is on a blocking criterion; observability
adds usage.requests → coverage.metrics.verify_requests.
RED→GREEN: live RED (3 INDETERMINATE) → fix → live GREEN: 8e6f→BLOCK, 92fa→PASS(33 verify requests vs old
25-request ceiling), 9df3→PASS, all real verdicts. The live exercise caught a FALSE-GREEN: my budget unit
test asserted req.config (which RunnerAgentStep sets) but the live runner read self._config — the
proxy-validation anti-pattern E5 warns about; added effective_max_iterations + a consumption-path test.
PR 87 (feat/plan-review-calibration-and-verify-recovery): 2 commits, full unit suite 2465 passed,
make lint+typecheck clean (pinned ruff 0.15.19; the bare global ruff 0.15.6 false-flagged F811 on passes.py).
Also folded in a concurrent _llm_commands.py advisory-overflow CLI change (user identified the source). MERGED.

== 3. PR 86 reconciliation (task/verifier-step-telemetry) ==
PR 86 (parallel work: step-usage telemetry + completion-verifier step floor 240→480) had 6 failing pytest
jobs. Root cause: (1) test_single_turn_runner_builds_agent_with_no_tools — PR86 logged usage_limits.request_limit
but that test stubs UsageLimits as a bare object() → AttributeError; (2) PR86 predated merged PR87 and collided
(both added requests to _extract_usage + touched runner budget/telemetry). Fix: merged origin/main into the
branch (worktree tingly-wishing-nygaard); deduped requests; bound req_limit to a LOCAL used by both UsageLimits
and the telemetry logs (fixes the stub test) reporting the EFFECTIVE eff_max_iter budget; unified test requests=7.
Merge aaf70ddf6 pushed; CI GREEN (30 pass / 4 skip / 0 fail); MERGEABLE. Auto-merge left OFF (user's call).

Env note for future sessions: the pre-commit hook runs make lint/typecheck via BARE PATH tools — activate
.venv first (source .venv/bin/activate) so it uses the pinned ruff 0.15.19 + venv mypy, else it false-fails on
the global ruff 0.15.6 (F811 on passes.py) and a missing global mypy. Each worktree has its own .venv.
